# ^ FIRST LINE IS LOAD-BEARING. A resuming agent compares this to `git rev-parse HEAD`.
#   If they differ, this dossier is STALE → ignore it and re-derive from RESUME.md + disk.
#   This file is a HINT, never a source of truth. It is regenerated by `/sde-handoff`.

# SDE Handoff @ <iso8601>

## OBJECTIVE
<one line from .sde/objective.md>

## WHERE WE ARE  (derived)
- active slice: <id> — phase: <rung name> (the lowest unsatisfied rung)
- coverage: <N/N intents bound> · trust: <K/M required evals trusted> · drift: <none | DETECTED>

## THE SINGLE NEXT ACTION  (derived; do this)
<the f(disk) result — e.g. "run eval suite for slice 01; eval I3.session is FAIL on the impl">

## RECENT  (last few, for context only — disk is authoritative)
- tasks done: <ids> · in-progress: <id@owner>
- last verdicts: <eval=PASS/FAIL ...>
- last decisions: <tail of decisions.md>

## OPEN QUESTIONS / BLOCKERS
- <none | what a human must resolve>
